tagline: Ray of Hope: Empowering ASHA Workers
name: Name
heroTitle: Empowering ASHA Workers, Transforming Rural Healthcare
heroSub: Providing the tools and training to bring quality healthcare to every doorstep in rural communities. Together, we heal and grow.
fieldSub: Intuitive technology built specifically for the unique challenges of rural frontline healthcare. Simple, reliable, and powerful.
offlineSub: Work anywhere, even without internet. Data syncs automatically once you reach a network area, ensuring no patient record is lost.
focusSub: Specialized care modules tailored for rural health demographics.
ctaSub: Join thousands of health workers across India who are making healthcare accessible for everyone, one doorstep at a time.
footerTag: Empowering health workers to build healthier rural communities across India.

healthNurturedSub: Customized digital workflows that go beyond basic logs — delivering community wellbeing at scale.
ecosystemTitle: A comprehensive digital health ecosystem for field workers
ecosystemSub: Delivering holistic field-testing tools, coordination aids, and reporting dashboards directly to your palm.
mosaicOfflineDesc: Ensure field productivity even in zero-connectivity zones with reliable automatic background sync.
mosaicHighRiskDesc: Instantly categorize and prioritize high-risk patients using automated color-coded alerts.
mosaicReferralDesc: Streamline patient transfers and share digital health records instantly with local medical officers.
mosaicIncentiveDesc: Real-time transparent logs tracking your daily targets, schedules, and active task progress.
testimonialHeaderTitle: Hear from our dedicated ASHA Workers themselves!
testimonialHeaderSub: Delivering the same high level of health service from district hospitals to remote doorsteps.
sujataQuote: Before AshaKiran, tracking maternal records across three villages meant massive physical ledgers, missing sync pages, and delayed referral coordinates. Now, everything stays securely inside my phone, even when network connectivity drops.
supportFaqText: Need further technical coordinates? Browse the guidelines, or reach out to our program managers directly from your dashboard profile logs.
copyright: © 2026 AshaKiran Healthcare. Care. Empower. Uplift. All rights reserved.
carouselMchSubtext: Seamlessly log antenatal care, child nutrition metrics, and vital sign updates across your entire assigned zone.
carouselVaxSubtext: Auto-generate digital reminders for infant vaccine schedules, preventing coverage gaps across remote villages.
carouselNcdSubtext: Screen, flag, and follow up on hypertension, diabetes and chronic conditions with structured follow-up pipelines.
carouselSyncSubtext: Work seamlessly in zero-connectivity zones. All data syncs automatically the moment connectivity is restored.
carouselVisitSubtext: Plan, assign, and track home visits with intelligent prioritization based on patient risk levels and urgency.
carouselRecordsSubtext: End-to-end encrypted patient profiles with complete medical history, prescriptions, and lab reports at your fingertips.
carouselAccessSubtext: Bridging the gap between urban medical expertise and rural doorsteps through digital-first community health delivery.
carouselReportsSubtext: Capture and share structured medical reports with doctors instantly, enabling faster diagnosis and treatment plans.
faqOfflineRegQ: How does AshaKiran handle offline patient data registration?
faqOfflineRegA: AshaKiran utilizes a secure, offline-first IndexedDB container directly inside your browser. All registration details, medical logs, and timeline updates are stored locally and will sync automatically in the background the moment an internet connection is established.
faqRealtimeLogsQ: Can medical officers view real-time logs updated by ground workers?
faqRealtimeLogsA: Yes. Once synced, ground worker logs are pushed directly into our secure cloud databases, generating instant dashboard updates. Medical officers can review high-risk flags, refer patients, and analyze field metrics in real-time.
faqEncryptedRecordsQ: How are patient health records securely encrypted on the platform?
faqEncryptedRecordsA: AshaKiran ensures high protection using AES-256 equivalent browser-level database isolation, end-to-end encrypted transit pathways (HTTPS/TLS), and secure server credentials. Unauthorized access is strictly blocked to maintain client confidentiality.
faqLocalLanguagesQ: Does the app support local languages for demographic entry?
faqLocalLanguagesA: Absolutely. AshaKiran is custom-built with multi-language localizer frameworks supporting Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Bengali, Gujarati, Punjab, and English, allowing workers to operate in their regional dialects effortlessly.
maternalCareDesc: Comprehensive pre-natal and post-natal tracking for mother and child health milestones.
childVaccinationDesc: Digital immunization registers to ensure zero missed doses for infants in the community.
diseaseTrackingDesc: Early identification and reporting of infectious diseases to prevent community outbreaks.
ncdMonitoringDesc: Tracking chronic conditions like hypertension and diabetes through regular screenings.
familyPlanningDesc: Counseling and distribution of reproductive health resources for planned families.
communityOutreachDesc: Engagement and health literacy campaigns for rural and underserved populations.
programmesHeaderDescSimple: AshaKiran helps ASHA workers manage maternal care, chronic illness monitoring, child healthcare, follow-up visits, and rural health outreach through a unified digital platform.
nurturingRuralCareDesc: ASHA workers serve as the primary link between communities and public health systems. AshaKiran provides clinical record structures to standardize data collection, follow-ups, and risk tracking without administrative overhead.
stories.heroSub: Real narratives of courage, compassion, and transformation from India's rural health activists.
stories.attributionNotice: All videos are sourced from YouTube. Content belongs to respective creators. AshaKiran does not host or download any video content — all streams are played directly from YouTube.
stories.noStoriesDesc: Try a different search or category.
stories.joinMissionDesc: Become an ASHA worker or PHC partner and help extend care to the last mile.
stories.shareStoryDesc: Are you a health worker with a story to tell? We'd love to feature your impact.
stories.video.C6QnU19vkk4.title: Main Bhi ASHA — A Day in the Life of an ASHA Worker
stories.video.C6QnU19vkk4.desc: Follow a certified ASHA worker through her daily rounds — from home visits to immunisation drives — in this official Ministry of Health production.
stories.video.WMVEruQei0s.title: The Healthcare Workers Taking Care of Mothers and Babies
stories.video.WMVEruQei0s.desc: UNICEF India documents the frontline heroes ensuring safe motherhood and child survival across remote Indian villages.
stories.video.byLthGsJwfc.title: Healers of India — Strengthening Primary Health Care Through ASHA Workers
stories.video.byLthGsJwfc.desc: A powerful documentary showcasing how ASHA workers are the invisible backbone of India's primary healthcare system in rural communities.
stories.video.nJy9sD5cV3s.title: India's Female ASHA Workers: Backbone of the Country's Healthcare System
stories.video.nJy9sD5cV3s.desc: International media coverage of how women ASHA workers transformed India's response to COVID-19 and continue to fight for fair wages.
stories.video.FFpwhIlh4_M.title: ASHA — The Foot Soldiers of Change (Documentary Film)
stories.video.FFpwhIlh4_M.desc: An award-winning documentary film capturing the transformative work of ASHA workers across three states over a span of two years.
stories.video.xN1vqRwBu_c.title: Meet Sunita Didi: The ASHA Worker Who Achieved a 100% TB Cure Rate
stories.video.xN1vqRwBu_c.desc: Sunita Kumari became a TB warrior in her village, tracking every patient until they completed their medication with zero dropout.
stories.video.6fVyEpMiBOU.title: A Day in the Life of an ASHA Worker
stories.video.6fVyEpMiBOU.desc: From dawn to dusk, this short documentary captures the exhausting yet deeply rewarding daily work of an ASHA Karyakarta in rural Bihar.
stories.video.mfJ4KkwF9Hc.title: ASHA | Health Activist | Functions & Role Explained
stories.video.mfJ4KkwF9Hc.desc: An educational breakdown of the ASHA programme — her role, responsibilities, and how she coordinates with AWW and ANM for community health.
aboutHeroTitle: Bridging Healthcare Gaps in Rural India
aboutHeroSub: Leveraging technology to ensure that quality medical care is a right for every citizen, regardless of their pin code.
aboutQualityDesc: Ensuring every consultation and treatment meets global medical standards through rigorous vetting and digital tracking.
aboutAccessibilityDesc: Removing physical and financial barriers by mapping clinics and enabling remote consultations in remote villages.
aboutEmpowermentDesc: Providing local healthcare workers with tools and data to manage community health proactively and independently.
challengeDistanceDesc: Patients travel an average of 40km to reach the nearest qualified physician.
challengeLanguageDesc: Complex medical advice often gets lost in translation between urban doctors and rural patients.
challengeDataDesc: Lack of digital health records leads to redundant tests and delayed critical diagnoses.
responseMeshDesc: A decentralized registry of rural health centers updated in real-time via community contribution.
responseLocalDesc: Native language support across 12 dialects ensuring clarity and trust in medical interactions.
responseIdsDesc: Seamless digital records accessible via a phone number, enabling continuity of care.
featureMappingDesc: Find verified clinics nearby with detailed service lists and real-time operational status, powered by OpenStreetMap.
featureDiscoveryDesc: Verify credentials and book appointments with specialists who understand rural needs.
featureNativeDesc: Speak in your language. AI-assisted translation for medical terms in 12 regional languages.
featureOfflineDesc: Works even in low-connectivity areas, syncing your data automatically when a network is found.
whoASHADesc: Empowering ground-level heroes with diagnostic tools and digital coordination.
whoPatientsDesc: Providing easy access to health records and specialist care without the journey.
whoCliniciansDesc: Extending their reach to help more patients with structured remote data.
impactDesc: Rather than chasing hyper-growth marketing metrics, we focus on steady, sustainable, and high-trust healthcare support in rural communities.
impactClinicsDesc: Verified rural clinics cataloged for precision medical access.
impactLanguagesDesc: Medical terms and interfaces translated to bridge communication gaps.
impactVillagesDesc: Providing essential link infrastructure to remote habitations.
impactHealthDesc: Continuous digital record syncing working even in zero-connectivity areas.
anandibaiAlt: Dr. Anandibai Joshi — India's first female physician
anandibaiQuote: "I will serve my country with all my heart and all my soul."
pioneerPara1: Our work is inspired by the indomitable spirit of Dr. Anandibai Joshi, India's first female physician. In an era when education for women was restricted, she traveled across oceans to obtain a medical degree, driven by the heartbreak of losing her infant son to lack of medical care.
pioneerPara2: Her journey symbolizes the very essence of AshaKiran: the unwavering belief that no life should be lost due to a lack of access to quality healthcare. We carry forward her legacy by bringing modern medicine to the doorstep of those who need it most.
roadmapPhase1Desc: Implementing light-weight on-device AI for basic symptom screening without internet.
roadmapPhase2Desc: High-fidelity video consultations with integrated hardware for remote vitals monitoring.
roadmapPhase3Desc: Expanding AshaKiran to every aspirational district in India, creating a true national health mesh.
readyToTransformSub: Join us in our journey to build a healthier, more equitable future for every village.

patientSavedLocally: Patient saved locally — will sync when online 📡
contactUsSub: Have questions, feedback, or want to collaborate on AshaKiran? Reach out to the developer or explore the open-source repository.
loginSub: Please enter your credentials to access the portal
privacySub: At AshaKiran, patient data security and privacy are central to our mission. This policy outlines how healthcare records and user details are securely handled.
privacySec1Para1: All user data is securely stored and handled with industry-standard encryption protocols.
privacySec1Para2: Offline sync data stored locally on your device (IndexedDB/Cache) is securely managed to prevent unauthorized extraction.
privacySec2Para1: Patient records are strictly private and accessible only to authorized healthcare coordinators.
privacySec2Para2: The platform does not share sensitive patient information publicly under any circumstances.
privacySec2Para3: Healthcare records must be handled responsibly and ethically by all registered ASHA workers and staff members.
privacySec3Para1: Unauthorized access, snooping, or data extraction from patient databases is strictly prohibited.
privacySec3Para2: Users must obtain proper, explicit consent from patients before uploading their clinical profiles or medical records.
privacySec4Para1: AshaKiran is an open-source clinical project built to support ground-level community health workers. The application owner/developer permission is explicitly required before commercial reuse or redistribution of this software or its core services.
signupSub: Create your ASHA portal account to start serving
